response.overview: When Sid loses his beloved wife, his world falls apart. Desperate to undo the impossible, he sets out on a perilous journey that leads him deep into the wilderness, where he discovers a mysterious cave and an enigmatic black magic practitioner named Bhairav. Bhairav promises to bring Sid's wife back-but at a terrible price: a blood sacrifice. Sid complies, offering a goat for the ritual. The spell works-his wife returns, but soon, Sid realizes that something is terribly wrong.
response.title: Forever in My Heart
